lesson.subtitle: Aula 6 -- Review & Consolidation 1 -- Networking Event Simulation
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Rafael de Andrade Brandão | Aula 6 -- Review & Consolidation 1

listenings.text: Good evening, everyone, and welcome to our business networking night. My name is Carol, and I am your host tonight. Thank you so much for coming. Please wear your badge, so everyone can read your name. Tonight is a great chance to meet new people and make new connections. Do not be shy. Walk around, mingle, and say hello to our guests. There are drinks and snacks at the back of the room. If you meet someone interesting, remember to exchange business cards. You can always follow up by email tomorrow. Enjoy the evening, and have a wonderful time.

Hi, this is Rafael. I am calling to tell you about the networking event last night. It was really good. I met about ten new people, and I made three strong connections. I greeted the host first, and then I started to mingle. I asked simple questions, like what do you do and where are you from. People were very friendly. I collected several business cards, and I will follow up by email this week. I think two of them could become new clients for our company. I would like to tell you more in our meeting tomorrow. Talk to you soon.

extra_audio.text: Rafael arrives at the networking event and puts on his badge. He greets the host with a friendly hello. Then he starts to mingle and meets a new guest. They talk and exchange business cards. The next day, he follows up with a short email.
